title: Replace command (Edit menu)
description:
Replace command (Edit menu)

Replace Command (Edit Menu)
 : Ctrl+R

Search for a text string and replace it with new text.

Item	Description

Find
		 What	Type
		 the text you want to search for. When executing [Replace] with
		 a string selected, the selected string is displayed. If no text
		 was selected, then the text from the last Find will be displayed.

Replace
		 With	Enter
		 the replacement text here.

		The replacement text can be empty.

Current
		 File	Searches
		 only in the current program file and include file.

All Files	Searches
		 all files in the project.

Whole
		 Word	Searches
		 for the full word by itself and not as part of another word.

Match
		 Case	Text
		 must also match lower and upper case in order to be found.

Replace
		 All	Replaces
		 all occurrences.

Replace	If already
		 found, replaces the current find, otherwise searches for the next
		 occurrence.

Find
		 Next / Find Previous	Finds
		 the next, or previous occurrence.

		(Click the []
		 button to select the search method.)

Close	Closes
		 the dialog box.
